message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor white
skinparam interfaceBorderColor black
skinparam actorBackgroundColor white
skinparam actorBorderColor black
skinparam databaseBackgroundColor white
skinparam databaseBorderColor black
skinparam componentBackgroundColor white
skinparam componentBorderColor black
skinparam packageBackgroundColor white
skinparam packageBorderColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor white
skinparam noteBorderColor black
skinparam arrowColor black
skinparam lineColor black
skinparam textAlignment center

class "CarPart" as CarPart {
    + PrintPart()
    + AddPart(v interface{})
    + RemovePart(v interface{})
}

class "Engine" as Engine {
    Container: list.List
}

class "Suspension" as Suspension {
    Container: list.List
}

class "Car" as Car {
    Container: list.List
}

class "CylinderBlock" as CylinderBlock
class "Sump" as Sump
class "Crankshaft" as Crankshaft
class "Rod" as Rod
class "Absorber" as Absorber
class "Damping" as Damping
class "Stabilizer" as Stabilizer
class "Rack" as Rack
class "Lever" as Lever
class "Spring" as Spring

CarPart <|-- Car
CarPart <|-- Engine
CarPart <|-- Suspension

Engine --> CylinderBlock
Engine --> Sump
Engine --> Crankshaft
Engine --> Rod

Suspension --> Absorber
Suspension --> Damping
Suspension --> Stabilizer
Suspension --> Rack
Suspension --> Lever
Suspension --> Spring

Car --> Engine
Car --> Suspension

@enduml
